intended_use: CEPHX - Cephalometric Analysis Software is indicated for use by dentists who provide orthodontic treatment for image analysis, simulation, profilogram, VTO (Visual Treatment Objective), and patient co
intended_use_full: CEPHX - Cephalometric Analysis Software is indicated for use by dentists who provide orthodontic treatment for image analysis, simulation, profilogram, VTO (Visual Treatment Objective), and patient consultation. Results produced by the software's diagnostic, treatment planning and simulation tools are dependent on the interpretation of trained and licensed practitioners or dentists. The device is only for use on patients 14 years old and above.
target_condition: Facial abnormalities requiring orthodontic treatment planning and diagnosis
ground_truth: Manually detected landmarks by three experienced orthodontic specialists
other_metrics: 21 clinically significant landmarks evaluated; margin of 2.0mm or less considered 'pass'; at least 85% of cases meeting pass criteria required; study reported 'very good accuracy without any outliers'
